hook.summary: Rapid placement of red blocks into a grid, clearing lines with satisfying sound effects.
hook.visual_action: Red blocks are dropped into a grid, clearing horizontal and vertical lines quickly.

scene_flow: Initial sequence of red blocks clearing multiple lines in a grid.
Montage of gameplay with various colored blocks and positive feedback text like 'Great!' and 'Wonderful!'.
Text overlays emphasizing the game is free and good for boredom.
Final gameplay sequence showing high-speed line clears and a high score.
End card with the game title 'Block Rush' and app store download buttons.
on_screen_text: This game is perfect for killing boredom
Easy to solve but hard to get high score
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players looking for a satisfying and free way to pass the time.
